chunks.text:
All Spark Electric — Electrical services in Crowley and DFW. Services:
- Electrical repairs
- Panel upgrades
- Lighting installation
- Ceiling fans
- EV charger installation
- Generator installation

Contact Information:
- Phone: (214) 789-5114
- Email: andrew@callallsparkelectric. com
- Address: 1007 Horse Creek Rd Suite 3, Crowley, TX 76036
- Website: https://callallsparkelectric. com/
- Service Area: Crowley, TX and DFW area

Rating: 5 stars with 100 reviews.
